prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约18173→18019→15132→17929→20349名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025年基准位次约20349名，较2024年后移约2420名，为近五年最低（位次数字最大）；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划2021年68人、2022年78人、2023年66人、2024年68人、2025年67人；2026年计划88人，较2025年扩招21人（+31.3%），扩招幅度较大，理论上会推高位次数字（竞争略有缓解），但需结合考生规模综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名约第38名（2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次；秦皇岛分校与东北大学共享办学资源与学位证书，层次定位明确；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及校区认知争议；抖音热度总排名第82位（一般），短视频曝光量偏低，未出现明显负面舆情或投档异常记录；依托东北大学学科评估结果，控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程A-，与物理类招生专业（计算机类、自动化类、机械类、材料类等）高度匹配，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐，带动相关院校工科专业整体竞争升温；江苏省2026年物理类考生约37.98万人（估算），较2025年（26.06万）大幅增加约45.7%，竞争显著加剧；学校位于河北省秦皇岛市，对江苏省考生属跨省报考；该校在江苏省招生占比约3.15%（2025年），非本省高校，地域偏好因素中性偏弱。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次20349名、2026年计划扩招31.3%、江苏省物理类考生大幅增加约45.7%以及工科专业热度持续偏热等因素，扩招效应被考生规模激增部分抵消，竞争整体加剧；预测2026年物理类最低位次约24375名，区间23875–24875名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 18173 → 18019 → 15132 → 17929 → 20349, showing a fluctuating and declining trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 20349, which is about 2420 places lower than 2024, the lowest in the past five years (largest ranking number); the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Province for Physics Category was 68 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 66 in 2023, 68 in 2024, and 67 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 88, an increase of 21 students (+31.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which theoretically would push the ranking number higher (slightly easing competition), but needs to be assessed in conjunction with the overall number of examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking about 38th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (2026), belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide; the Qinhuangdao campus shares educational resources and degree certificates with Northeastern University, with a clear hierarchical positioning; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus recognition controversies; the overall Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd (average), with relatively low short video exposure, and no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal admission records; relying on the discipline evaluation results of Northeastern University, Control Science and Engineering is A+, Computer Science and Technology is A, Metallurgical Engineering is A, Mechanical Engineering is A-, Materials Science and Engineering is A-, and Software Engineering is A-, which highly match the majors enrolled in Physics Category (Computer Class, Automation Class, Mechanical Class, Materials Class, etc.), exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be hot/highly recommended in society, driving up overall competition for engineering majors in related institutions; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province for 2026 is about 379,800, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025 (260,600), markedly intensifying competition; the university is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province, which is a cross-province application for Jiangsu examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu Province is about 3.15% (2025), not a local university, so regional preference factors are neutral to weak.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 20349 in 2025, a 31.3% expansion in the 2026 plan, a significant increase of about 45.7% in Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province, and the sustained high popularity of engineering majors, the expansion effect is partially offset by the surge in examinee numbers, leading to overall intensified competition; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 24375, with a range of 23875–24875.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation Class (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Communication Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Class (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Instrument Class (Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Internet of Things Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Class (Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, etc.)
- Business Administration Class (Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)
- Economics Class (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- E-commerce/Information Management and Information Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 23875–24875, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 23800), you can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology and Automation Class; if your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (outside 24800), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings.

学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 38th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide; the Qinhuangdao campus shares the educational resources of Northeastern University; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with average Douyin popularity and no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records; relying on Northeastern University's discipline evaluation results, advantageous disciplines such as Control Science and Engineering (A+) and Computer Science and Technology (A) have low relevance to History Category majors (Economics, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature), with weak disciplinary support.
